external_references.source_name: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024
external_references.description: Chris Traynor. (2024, January 18). Rooting For Secrets with TruffleHog. Retrieved April 15, 2026.
Trufflesecurity. (2026, April 8). TruffleHog Enterprise. Retrieved April 15, 2026.

objects.description: [TruffleHog](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9009) has the ability to scan cloud storage services for credentials to include Amazon (AWS) S3 and Google Cloud Storage.(Citation: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024)(Citation: Github TruffleSecurity Trufflehog April 2025)
